prestazioni: 3800 Series II L36 (VIN K) 3.8L V6 supercharger upgrade with a Vortech V-3 Si-Trim centrifugal supercharger (8 psi boost, polished housing, 3.60" pulley) paired with a custom intercooler core from Spearco (part #IC-1000) and a 3-core aluminum radiator from Griffin (part #2-25121-X) to manage heat soak under sustained load

Full 3.8L L36 forged internals: Mahle forged pistons (9.5:1 compression, part #L36-9.5), Eagle Specialty Products forged H-beam connecting rods (part #CRS58003800), and a Callies Compstar crankshaft (4.00" stroke, part #40010S) with ACL Race Series main and rod bearings (part #5M780H)

Custom fuel system overhaul: Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump (part #F90000267), Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors (part #ID1000-60-510-10), and a Holley Dominator ECU (part #554-111) with a custom tune from HP Tuners (VCM Suite) optimized for E85 blends and aggressive ignition timing (22° base, 28° total advance at peak torque)
estetica: Full custom body kit from RK Sport (LeSabre-specific widebody conversion, part #RK-9900) with carbon fiber front splitter (RK Sport part #RK-9901) and rear diffuser (RK Sport part #RK-9902), paired with a custom 3-piece rear spoiler from DTM Style (part #DTM-001) for downforce at speed

Billet Specialties Tecknic wheels (18x9 front, 18x10 rear, part #BS-5189038) with Nitto NT05R tires (255/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear) and Air Lift Performance 3P management (part #26502) for adjustable ride height and stance

Full interior rewrap in Alcantara (Autometer part #12500) with custom Recaro SRD seats (part #SRD-900) in black Alcantara with red stitching, paired with a custom roll cage from Autopower (part #AP-1000) and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (part #001-100-00-15) for track-ready ergonomics
